# aikido_cloud_gcp (Resource)

Connects a GCP cloud environment to Aikido Security.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aikido_cloud_gcp" "production" {
  name        = "GCP Production"
  environment = "production"
  project_id  = "my-gcp-project"
  access_key  = file("service-account-key.json")
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `access_key` (String, Sensitive) Stringified JSON of the service account access key or Workload Identity Federation config.
- `environment` (String) The environment classification: `production`, `staging`, `development`, or `mixed`.
- `name` (String) A name for this cloud environment.
- `project_id` (String) The GCP project identifier.

### Read-Only

- `external_id` (String) The external identifier from GCP.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the cloud environment.
